transactions.desc: The Pirates signed Fletcher to a minor-league contract Friday.
The Red Sox released Coulombe on Saturday.
The Tigers optioned Brieske to Triple-A Toledo on Saturday.
The Chicago Cubs traded RHP Aiden Moffett to the  Athletics.
The  Athletics traded RHP Aaron Civale to the Chicago Cubs.
The Tigers reinstated Valdez from the bereavement list Saturday.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Saturday.
The Guardians recalled Dion from Triple-A Columbus on Saturday.
The Athletics designated Meneses for assignment Saturday.
The Athletics selected Hartlieb's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
Bradish agreed to terms on a five-year, $90 million contract extension with the Orioles on Saturday.
The Mariners designated Mastrobuoni for assignment Saturday.
The Mariners reinstated Rodriguez from the 7-day injured list Saturday.
The Diamondbacks selected Carrillo to the 40-man roster Saturday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Del Castillo from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
Texas optioned Teodo to Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
Texas optioned Collyer to Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
The Rangers recalled Corniell from Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
The Rangers activated Junis (hip) from the 15-day injured list Saturday.
The Rockies reinstated Sugano (back) from the injured list ahead of his start Saturday against the Reds.
The Brewers recalled Perkins from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Yankees signed Hanner to a major-league contract and optioned him to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Blue Jays optioned Macko to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
Toronto optioned Van Eyk to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays recalled Little from Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays recalled Estrada from Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.
The Pirates reinstated Dotel (lat) from the injured list Saturday and appointed him as their 27th man for the team's doubleheader against the Guardians.
The Pirates selected Curtis' contract from Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Kansas City Royals traded OF Rudy Martin to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Trey Pooser to the St. Louis Cardinals.
